prompt: Create a high-fashion magazine cover photo in a polished editorial style, vertical portrait orientation, showing a beautiful young adult woman walking confidently toward the camera in the middle of a modern financial district at sunset. She is centered full-body, photographed at street level with cinematic depth of field, framed by tall glass office towers on both sides reflecting warm golden evening light. The mood is elegant, urban, powerful, and refined, like an upscale fashion magazine cover about after-work style. The woman has long dark hair styled in a thick side braid over one shoulder, a slim sophisticated silhouette, and a poised runway-like stride. She wears a fitted ribbed turtleneck sweater in burnt orange with decorative gold buttons on one shoulder, a high-waisted pencil skirt in warm brown, a black belt with a gold buckle, and carries a structured black handbag in one hand. Her expression should feel calm, self-assured, and graceful. Use flattering soft golden-hour lighting, realistic skin and fabric textures, crisp fashion-photography detail on the outfit, and slightly blurred businesspeople in the background walking through the plaza to suggest a busy city evening. The background should include exactly 4 distant office workers, softly out of focus, spread across the walkway. Add realistic magazine cover typography integrated over the image: a very large elegant serif masthead on the upper left reading CITY POISE; beneath it on the left, the cover lines "AFTER-WORK STYLE THAT COMMANDS THE EVENING", "MODERN ELEGANCE", "Polished looks for the office and beyond.", "WORK. WALK. WIND DOWN.", "Versatile pieces that move with your day.", "THE POWER OF NEUTRALS", and "Warm tones, clean lines, Quiet confidence."; on the upper right, small text "STYLE & CULTURE" and "MAY 2024"; below that on the right, the teaser "Sunset meetings and city lights. Your best look starts here."; in the lower right, the cover line "EVENING ELEVATED" with the smaller text "From desk to dinner plans— effortless style that transitions beautifully."; and a realistic barcode box at the bottom right with "MAY 2024", US and CAN prices, small issue numbers, and barcode lines. Make the overall composition clean, premium, balanced, and convincingly like a real contemporary fashion magazine cover.
